mapper.select: SELECT t.rowid AS rowid, t.tblname AS tblname, t.lingma_sys_ent AS lingmaSysEnt, t.hasDefaultFields AS hasDefaultFields FROM _base_tbllist t LEFT JOIN _base_dbinfo d ON d.Id = t.dbid AND d.lingma_sys_ent = t.lingma_sys_ent WHERE t.lingma_sys_ent = 'NewApp' AND t.tblname = #{tableName} AND ( #{dbName} IS NULL OR #{dbName} = '' OR d.Name = #{dbName} OR d.NameStr = #{dbName} OR d.ValueName = #{dbName} OR #{dbName} = DATABASE() ) ORDER BY t.rowid LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT f.enname FROM base_tblfield f WHERE f.lingma_sys_ent = 'NewApp' AND f.enname IS NOT NULL AND f.enname != '' AND ( (#{tableId} IS NOT NULL AND #{tableId} != '' AND BINARY f.tblid = BINARY #{tableId}) OR BINARY f.tblname = BINARY #{tableName} ) ORDER BY f.enname

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM base_tblfield f WHERE f.lingma_sys_ent = 'NewApp' AND IFNULL(f.IsPKey, 0) != 0 AND ( (#{tableId} IS NOT NULL AND #{tableId} != '' AND BINARY f.tblid = BINARY #{tableId}) OR BINARY f.tblname = BINARY #{tableName} )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO base_tblfield ( rowid, tblid, tblname, enname, cnname, DataType, DataLen, IsPKey, ordIdx, lingma_sys_is_delete, createuser, createtime, updateuser, updatetime, lingma_sys_ent, status ) VALUES ( #{rowid}, #{tblid}, #{tblname}, #{enname}, #{cnname}, #{dataType}, #{dataLen}, #{isPKey}, #{ordIdx}, 0, 'LOCAL_SQL', NOW(), 'LOCAL_SQL', NOW(), #{lingmaSysEnt}, '0' )
mapper.update: UPDATE _base_tbllist SET hasDefaultFields = 1, updateuser = 'LOCAL_SQL', updatetime = NOW() WHERE rowid = #{tableId}
